summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Hydrated open PRs were kept independent unless security-shaped token/secret exposure evidence required quarantine; already-closed PRs were left closed; candidates missing from the preflight artifact were scoped to needs_human or route_security rather than guessed.

actions.reason: Secret-bearing status output is security-sensitive enough for scoped quarantine.
